linkedin.description: LinkedIn telemetry: sensor/metrics collection, conversion tracking, ad pixel, adblock-detection script, internal Piwik, marketing tag utag/vendor paths, LMS analytics, Merchant Pool fingerprinting, and lnkd.in redirector. Connection-oriented rules include websocket and webtransport resource types.

fingerprint_vendors.description: Client-side fingerprinting and anti-bot vendors: Fingerprint Pro, open-source FingerprintJS CDN, DataDome, PerimeterX/HUMAN, Sift, Forter, ThreatMetrix/TransUnion, Iovation, Kasada, Sardine, Shape Security/F5. Includes current Fingerprint CDN/API domains, api.fpjs.pro, npm loader CDN, HUMAN sensor/connect hosts, Sift JS/CSP plus api.sift.com hosts, and persistent transport resource types.

captcha_vendors.description: CAPTCHA / device-attestation vendors (Arkose Labs, FunCAPTCHA, DataDome response pages under captcha-delivery.com, and Cloudflare Turnstile / Challenge Platform under challenges.cloudflare.com). Connection-oriented rules include websocket and webtransport resource types. DISABLED BY DEFAULT — blocking these will break logins on sites that use them as CAPTCHA or device-check challenges (X signup, Roblox, several crypto exchanges, Cloudflare-protected forms, some enterprise SSO flows).

session_replay.description: Session-replay, heatmap, and product-analytics vendors that record user interaction: FullStory, LogRocket, Mouseflow, Contentsquare, Smartlook, Quantum Metric, Microsoft Clarity, Heap, Pendo, Lucky Orange, Inspectlet, Browsee, PostHog, and Sentry Replay CDN bundles. Includes current LogRocket CSP host family, Clarity c.bing.com, Heap heap-api/heapanalytics plus classic replay auryc hosts, PostHog cloud ingest/assets under i.posthog.com, and persistent transport resource types.

datadog_rum.description: Datadog Real User Monitoring intake endpoints (US1, US3, US5, EU1, US1-FED, AP1, AP2) and browser agent CDN. Connection-oriented rules include websocket and webtransport resource types. DISABLED BY DEFAULT — Datadog RUM is also widely used for legitimate performance and error monitoring that site operators and users may want to keep.
